message:
Add agent name normalization to treat hyphens and underscores as equivalent

Agent name filters (e.g., in PathMapping and PathTrie) previously required
exact string matches, so "claude-code" and "claude_code" were treated as
different agents. This caused path rewriting rules to silently fail when
the agent name format varied between configuration and runtime.

Add agent_name_matches_filter() in types.rs that normalizes agent names
by lowercasing and replacing hyphens with underscores before comparison.
Apply this normalizer in both PathMapping::applies_to_agent() and
TrieMapping::applies_to_agent() so all path rewriting consistently
handles naming variations.

Add test in path_trie.rs verifying that hyphenated and underscored agent
name aliases match each other in both directions.

Also add rust-toolchain.toml pinning the nightly toolchain with rustfmt
and clippy components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
